text: He is a tall, friendly man.
It is a lovely small ancient town.
We saw a beautiful old blue door.
You went to that little town by the sea, right? What was it like?
It was a lovely small ancient town. The streets were narrow and quiet, and the old houses were beautiful.
That sounds amazing. Did you meet anyone interesting there?
Yes! A tall, friendly man with short curly hair. He worked at a cozy little cafe with a stunning rooftop view.
A rooftop view! Was the place crowded?
In the morning it was peaceful, but in the evening it was crowded and full of music. It is my favorite place now.

Let me describe a person I met on my last trip. He was a tall, friendly man with short curly hair. He worked at a small cafe near my hotel. Every morning he was smiling and talking to everyone. He always wore a big blue hat. One day I asked him for directions, and he walked with me for ten minutes, just to be kind. He was not a famous person, but he made my trip special. When I think of that city, I always remember his warm smile. A friendly face can change a whole journey.

I want to describe my favorite place in the world. It is a small, ancient town near the sea. The streets are narrow and quiet, and the old stone houses are beautiful. In the morning the main square is peaceful, but in the evening it becomes crowded and full of music. There is a lovely rooftop cafe with a stunning view of the water. I love to sit there and watch the sunset. It is a cozy, charming place, and every corner tells a story. I cannot wait to go back.

First, Tânia arrived in a small, ancient town by the sea. Then she walked through the narrow, quiet streets and looked at the old stone houses. After that, she met a tall, friendly man with short curly hair. Next, he showed her a cozy rooftop cafe with a stunning view. Finally, she watched the sunset and decided it was her favorite place in the world.
He is a tall, friendly man.
The old streets are very narrow.
In the evening the square was crowded.
The cafe had a stunning view.
It is a lovely small ancient town.
The streets are narrow and quiet.
The cafe had a stunning rooftop view.
